name: GetGenAI (Packaging Compliance Review)
description: Run a selected GetGenAI inspector against structured packaging objects and product context.

auth.hint: Obtain a GetGenAI workspace API key and send it as Authorization: Bearer <KEY>.

tools.name: inspect_packaging
tools.description: Run a compliance inspector over packaging content.

params.name: inspector_id
params.description: Inspector identifier selected for the review.

params.name: objects
params.description: Packaging objects containing types and content such as hosted image URLs.
